name: Router
summary: Diagnose WHERE each URI action runs — before acting.
description: router:// is the pre-execution routing layer for urirun. Given an NL-derived plan of URI steps, it answers per step which target runs it (host or a named node), over which path, and whether that target is reachable — naming the failing layer (parse → target → route → reachability → safety) instead of letting an unroutable step fail late. Read-only: the router diagnoses, it never mutates.
useCases: Know where every action of an autonomous plan will run before committing.
Block a doomed plan pre-flight when a step targets a node not in the mesh.
Diagnose the failing execution layer (target/reachability) instead of an opaque late error.

examples.title: Diagnose an NL plan before executing
